top_signals.title: BHP Posts Solid Full-Year Output, Sees Copper Decline Ahead
top_signals.summary: BHP Group Ltd. posted solid full-year production despite a weaker final quarter, though it warned copper output will fall in the year ahead as grades decline at its flagship Chilean mines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: South Korea stocks slump after first rate rise in 3 years
top_signals.summary: Bank of Korea’s first move under Shin Hyun-song comes amid concern over won weakness and reliance on energy imports

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis. Full Text
